Home Learn Live receipt See live receipt

Beginner on-ramp · learn by doing

Start building — three steps, no jargon.

SourceA is a commercial platform for shipping agentic work with proof. This is the shortest real path today — not a course, not a sales call. Play, verify, then try the tools.

Full Duolingo-style learning comes only if analytics show beginners are a real segment. For now: self-serve steps that actually work.

  1. 1

    Play the proof quiz

    ALLOW, BLOCK, or tamper-FAIL — learn how governed AI decides in 3 minutes. Feels like a game; teaches the moat.

    Start quiz →
  2. 2

    See a live receipt

    Real factory output on disk — terminal, boot checks, PASS or BLOCK. Verify it yourself; no deck.

    Open live proof →
  3. 3

    Try Forge Terminal

    Chat with Brain in your browser and run a governed mission — the builder surface, not slides.

    Open Forge Terminal →

Ready to ship for real?

48h MVP intake → Platform sign-in Talk to a human
